title: U.S. sent Iran 15-point plan to end war, report says; Trump says 'in negotiations right now'
summary_full: "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated" to achieve President Donald Trump's military objectives, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.
summary_public: "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated" to achieve President Donald Trump's military objectives, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: U.S. sent Iran 15-point plan to end war
